title: The Limited Mail
writer: Charles Logue, Elmer E. Vance, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Monte Blue, Vera Reynolds, Willard Louis
plot: Bob Wilson, who becomes a tramp after being jilted by his fiancee, prevents the Limited Mail from being wrecked during a mountain storm and becomes fast friends with Jim Fowler, a railway mail clerk. Jim gets Bob a job on the rail...
